bird.name: Bannerman's weaver
bird.summary: Bannerman's weaver (Ploceus bannermani) is a species of bird in the weaver family, Ploceidae. It is native to the Western High Plateau.

locations.name: 巴門達高原
locations.summary: 巴門達高原是非洲中西部國家喀麥隆的高原，受赤道多雨氣候影響，每年平均降雨量1,000至2,000毫米，是薩納加河主要支流的發源地。

relations.subject: Bannerman's weaver
relations.evidence: It is native to the Western High Plateau

relations.subject: Bannerman's weaver
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Bannerman's weaver
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss. Its scientific and common names honor the ornithologist David Armitage Bannerman.{{cite book|last=Beolens|first=Bo|title=Whose Bird?
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
